projects.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
projects.problems_text: One payment task (Concrete Income 1) is 4 days overdue. Framing and cornice is blocked by a pending confirm schedule — the framing chain (inspection, sheetrock, insulation) is fully bottlenecked behind it.
projects.risk_text: Roof decking SOW and confirm delivery are both due tomorrow with no vendor assigned. Angel needs to move on this first thing Saturday.

projects.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
projects.completed_text: Marcio closed out drywall confirm schedule. Romina and Rey completed drywall purchase material. 2 tasks done today.
projects.problems_text: Doors and windows bank payment request is 25 days overdue — this has been sitting for weeks. Insulation bank payment is 2 days late. Interior paint and cabinets are blocked until paint confirm schedule is resolved.
projects.risk_text: Flooring complete takeoff is due tomorrow (Romina). The bank payment on doors and windows needs escalation — 25 days is unacceptable.

projects.name: Ginger Brown
projects.completed_text: Milagros closed cabinets approve WO and confirm schedule — both previously overdue. Strong finish on a project that had 19 overdue tasks at SOD.
projects.problems_text: Ginger's materials confirmation is still 2 days late. Electrical trim and plumbing trim are blocked by delivery and schedule confirmations that haven't been locked in.
projects.risk_text: Cabinets bill and payment is due tomorrow with no one assigned. Plumbing city inspection was pushed 17 days today — a significant slip that will cascade.

projects.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
projects.problems_text: Foundation porta potty is 1 day overdue (Angel). Framing is blocked waiting on delivery confirmation. Doors and windows, plumbing rough-in, and brick ties are all downstream in the blocked chain.
projects.risk_text: Exterior doors confirm delivery is due tomorrow with no one assigned. Windows were also pushed 2 days today — this will delay the whole exterior envelope.

projects.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
projects.problems_text: No tasks are overdue. Interior wall framing is blocked by purchase material — Jeff needs to unblock this before the Apr 24 due date slips.
projects.risk_text: Framing interior wall framing starts tomorrow but is currently blocked. Jeff needs to resolve the material purchase today or it will be late by Monday.

projects.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
projects.completed_text: Framing and cornice marked complete — a key milestone for this project.
projects.problems_text: No overdue or blocked tasks right now. Roofing purchase material was due today but unassigned.
projects.risk_text: Roofing confirm delivery is due tomorrow and has no one assigned. Someone needs to own the roofing procurement this weekend.

projects.name: CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522)
projects.completed_text: Massive push today — Marcio closed out the full roofing procurement chain: create SOW, secure pricing, purchase material, complete takeoff, confirm delivery, approve WO, and submit quote. 7 tasks completed.
projects.problems_text: Roofing install and bill & payment are still blocked waiting on confirm schedule — no vendor assigned to either.
projects.risk_text: Roofing installation is due Apr 22 (next Wednesday) with no vendor assigned and confirm schedule still open. This needs resolution Monday morning.

projects.name: Sergio Lares (212129)
projects.risk_text: Punch list cabinet and trim install is due tomorrow with no one assigned. Needs an owner before Monday.
